description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build and test that runs on push to master and dev branches and on pull requests to those branches, ignoring .md files. The workflow has two jobs: build on a matrix of ubuntu-latest with different C and C++ compilers, and windows on windows-latest. The build job installs dependencies, configures CMake, builds, and tests a C++ project with Redis and hiredis dependencies. The windows job installs dependencies, sets up vcpkg, and builds hiredis using MSVC.
